rationale: Educ. Code §39.052 governs school district accreditation determinations based on performance and financial accountability. It contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict.
quote: Each year, the commissioner shall determine the accreditation status of each school district.
_note: No textual conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on school district revenue is possible but not a conflict with this statute's operative provisions.
